name: The Office
subtitle: Executive Meeting Suite
usage:
Vertrauliche Gespräche & Strategie-Meetings. 
Work-Sessions, Meetings, Workshops.

Work sessions, meetings, workshops.
equipment: Moderationsbox, Whiteboards und Flipchart auf Anfrage

bookingNotesEn: Bookable full or half day. 9:00-13:00 & 14:00-18:00. Individual times on request. All prices excl. VAT. Drinks based on consumption. Catering on request.

name: 1. Obergeschoss

name: 4. Obergeschoss / Dachterrasse
